title: Intensely Garlicky Ukrainian Piccalilli Dumplings
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring piccalilli and dumplings, made with intensely garlicky flavors and a velvety texture, this recipe is also FODMAP-friendly. This nostalgic dish is perfect for those looking for a taste of Eastern European cuisine.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use gluten-free flour for gluten-free option

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, warm water, and egg, mixing until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a spoonful of piccalilli in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings to the pot.
Cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
While the dumplings are cooking, melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve with the garlicky butter sauce spooned over the top.
